---
title: NMPP Website
subtitle: A short discussion
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: ipp.scss
    logo: ipp-logo.jpg
    smaller: false
    footer: "IPP Presentation Template"
author:
  - name: Max Lindqvist
    # orcid: 0000-0000-0000-0000
    email: max.lindqvist@ipp.mpg.de
    affiliations: Max Planck Institute for Plasma Physics
date: last-modified
---

## Motivation for NMPP Hub Website

### Why We Need a Dedicated NMPP Website

- **Comprehensive overview**: Detailed, up-to-date info about NMPP not available on IPP pages
- **Research visibility**: Showcase codes, publications, and research groups
- **Recruitment**: Useful overview for new applicants, collaborators, and students
<!-- - **Knowledge Sharing**: Centralize access to numerical methods, plasma physics codes, and research outputs -->

### Current Challenges Addressed

- Scattered information across personal pages and repositories
- Limited visibility of NMPP's numerical methods expertise
- Difficulty for external (or internal!) researchers to discover our work
- Lack of centralized resource for codes and publications
<!-- - Need for better coordination between research groups -->

<!-- ### Target Audience

- **New Applicants**: Students and researchers interested in joining NMPP
- **Collaborators**: Scientists seeking partnership opportunities
- **Funding Agencies**: Demonstrating research impact and capabilities
- **Academic Community**: Sharing methodologies and results
- **Internal Team**: Better coordination and knowledge sharing -->

## Inspiration: Chalmers plasma theory

::: {style="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 70vh;"}
<iframe src="https://ft.nephy.chalmers.se/" width="100%" height="100%" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
:::

**Key Takeaways:**
- A
- B

## Inspiration: GyselaX code page

::: {style="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 70vh;"}
<iframe src="https://gyselax.github.io/" width="100%" height="100%" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
:::

**Key Takeaways:**
- A
- B

## Inspiration: BSC fusion group

::: {style="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 70vh;"}
<iframe src="https://fusion.bsc.es/" width="100%" height="100%" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
:::

**Key Takeaways:**

- Contact form
- Educations resources
- Media - videos, news, conferences, etc.

## NMPP Website

Open [this link](https://nmpp-hub.github.io/).

<!-- **Current Features:**

- **Codes**: Repository of numerical methods and plasma physics software
- **Groups**: Research group pages and collaborations
- **Members**: Team profiles and expertise
- **Dissertations**: Student research and theses
- **Publications**: Research papers and citations
- **About NMPP**: Mission and methodology overview -->

## Tutorial: Editing the NMPP Hub Website

### How to Update Content

First, [install npm](https://www.npmjs.com/get-npm), then follow these steps to install all dependencies:

```bash
npm install
```

Build the website locally to test changes:

```bash
npm run dev
```
then open `http://localhost:4321/` in your browser to see the changes.

## Tutorial: Updating automatically generated content

Install the required Python packages:

```bash
python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
```

Update website content with

```bash
python generate_website.py            # Basic update
python generate_website.py --refresh  # Fetch new metadata
```

#### Data Files

Edit the following YAML files to update content:

- [`data/members.yml`](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/blob/main/data/members.yml) - Add/update team members
- [`data/dois.yml`](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/blob/main/data/dois.yml) - Add new publications (DOIs)
- [`data/dissertations.yml`](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/blob/main/data/dissertations.yml) - Update dissertation information
- [`data/groups.yml`](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/blob/main/data/groups.yml) - Modify research groups
- [`data/codes.yml`](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/blob/main/data/codes.yml) - Add new code repositories

## Tutorial: Updating manually generated content

Edit the following Markdown files for static content:

- [`src/content/codes/code-name.md`](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/blob/main/src/content/codes/gempicx.md?plain=1) (see example page [here](https://nmpp-hub.github.io/codes/gempicx/)) 
- [`src/content/dissertations/dissertation-name.md`](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/blob/main/src/content/dissertations/development-and-analysis-of-structure-preserving-finite.md?plain=1) (see example page [here](https://nmpp-hub.github.io/dissertations/development-and-analysis-of-structure-preserving-finite/)) 
- [`src/content/groups/group-name.md`](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/blob/main/src/content/groups/geometric-numerical-integration.md?plain=1) (see example page [here](https://nmpp-hub.github.io/groups/geometric-numerical-integration/))
- [`src/content/members/firstname-lastname.md`](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/blob/main/src/content/members/eric-sonnendrucker.md?plain=1) (see example page [here](https://nmpp-hub.github.io/members/eric-sonnendrucker/))
- [`src/pages/index.astro`](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/blob/main/src/pages/index.astro?plain=1) (see homepage [here](https://nmpp-hub.github.io/))
- [`src/pages/about.astro`](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/blob/main/src/pages/about.astro?plain=1) (see about page [here](https://nmpp-hub.github.io/about/))

If you have any questions or requests, just ask me!

## Tutorial: Building and deploying

After changing content, just open a [pull request](https://github.com/nmpp-hub/nmpp-hub.github.io/pulls) and ask for review.

Once approved (by me?), the changes will be automatically deployed to GitHub Pages.

## Open Questions for Discussion

### Technical & Infrastructure Decisions

- **Domain**: Should we use a custom domain (nmpp.ipp.mpg.de) or keep github.io?
- **Code Organization**: Move any NMPP codes to a GitHub organization for better visibility?

### Content & Features

- **What's Missing**: Are there important sections or information not covered?
- **News Page**: Should we add a news/blog section for announcements and updates?
- **Educational Content**: Add tutorials, documentation, or learning resources?

### Maintenance & Governance

- **Maintenance**: Who will be responsible for keeping content up-to-date?
